page_content:
Formerly: FILM420.

FREN482 Gender and Ethnicity in Modern French Literature (3 Credits) Literature by women writers of France and other French speaking areas with a focus on the relationship between gender, ethnicity and writing. Taught in English.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

712 GEOG - Geographical Sciences

FREN488 Special Topics in Francophone Studies (3 Credits) Topic and language of instruction to be announced when offered. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
